```{r}
## Make RDOC ready file
ndar_audit_data <- left_join(AUDIT_Wave1,distinct(redcap_cleaned, tagid, dob),by="tagid") %>%
  mutate(interview_date=paste0(sprintf("%02d",month(survey_date)),"/",sprintf("%02d",day(survey_date)),"/",year(survey_date)),
         interview_age=round((interval(start =dob, end = survey_date) / duration(num = 1, units = "months")),0),
         sex="F",
         audit1=AUDIT_1,
         audit2=AUDIT_2,
         audit3=AUDIT_3,
         audit4=AUDIT_4,
         audit5=AUDIT_5,
         audit6=AUDIT_6,
         audit7=AUDIT_7,
         audit8=AUDIT_8,
         audit9=AUDIT_9,
         audit10=AUDIT_10,
         alcq=AUDIT_total
  )
ndar_audit_data <- left_join(ndar_key,ndar_audit_data, by="tagid") %>%
  mutate(src_subject_id=anontagid,
         subjectkey=guid) %>%
  filter(!is.na(subjectkey),
         !interview_age=="") %>%
  select(-contains("AUDIT",ignore.case = FALSE),-dob,-survey_date,-survey_type,-survey_name,-tagid,-anontagid,-ID,-guid)
audit_df_header<-rep(NA,length(read.csv(paste0(workdir,"RDoCdb/templates/audit01_template.csv"), header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)))
audit_df_header[1]<-read.csv(paste0(workdir,"RDoCdb/templates/audit01_template.csv"), header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)[1,1]
audit_df_header[2]<-read.csv(paste0(workdir,"RDoCdb/templates/audit01_template.csv"), header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)[1,2]

audit_temp<-as.list(read.csv(paste0(workdir,"RDoCdb/templates/audit01_template.csv"), header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, skip=1))
audit_temp_df<-data.frame(audit_temp)
ndar_audit_data<-rbind(audit_temp_df,ndar_audit_data)

part2<-colnames(ndar_audit_data)
part3<-as.matrix(ndar_audit_data)
colnames(part3)<-NULL
together<-rbind(audit_df_header,part2,part3)
write.table(together,file =paste0(workdir,"RDoCdb/output/jul2026/audit01.csv"),sep=",",na = "",row.names=FALSE,col.names=FALSE)
rm(audit,audit_Wave1,audit_Wave1_means,audit_Wave1_means_graph,audit_Wave1_totals,audit_Wave1_totals_graph,
   audit_df_header,audit_temp,audit_temp_df,part3,part2,together)
```
